name: Madison Mobility
recent_news: No public news found; very small Tucker, GA-based operator (~4 employees, ~$304K revenue) with no confirmed web presence.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-vehicle NEMT/wheelchair-van operator in metro Atlanta; not a school-bus contractor and far below Summit tuck-in threshold. Skip.

name: Medi-Cab
recent_news: Listed on Yelp/Chamber/findhelp directories as active Columbus, IN NEMT provider; no M&A or growth news. Related 'Classic Medicab Transportation' operates out of Greensburg, IN.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT/medi-cab operator, not a school-bus contractor; tiny (~5 employees, ~$304K). Not a Summit tuck-in fit.

name: T J Menears Transportation
districts_or_customers: Likely MTM/Medicaid network in St. Louis area
recent_news: No public news. Missouri Medicaid NEMT is brokered by MTM; small operators like this typically subcontract through MTM's network.
fit_notes: Single-vehicle owner-operator NEMT in north St. Louis; no school-bus operations. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: Guardian Paratransit Inc
recent_news: Yelp lists business as CLOSED as of March 2026; previously operated from 410 Catherine St, Utica, NY as a small NEMT/taxi/paratransit provider (NPI 1912273202 / 1922305903).
fit_notes: Appears defunct (closed 2026) and was a small NEMT/taxi paratransit operator, not a school-bus contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: A Plus Wheelchair Transport
recent_news: Listed under website wheelchairtransport4lky.com / Facebook page 'Wheelchair Transport, LLC. Ky.'; no school-bus, district, or M&A activity found. Louisville market is crowded with similar small wheelchair-transport firms (Able Care, Caliber Care+Transport, etc.).
fit_notes: Single-owner wheelchair/NEMT van service in Louisville; no school-bus or SPED contracts identified. Not a Summit tuck-in fit; also outside Summit's listed states.
